headline: Denali Therapeutics Teases April 5 FDA Decision for Tivi as Launch Plans and Pipeline Catalysts Build
summary: Denali Therapeutics (NASDAQ:DNLI) executives outlined near-term regulatory milestones, commercial launch preparations, and a broadening pipeline during a discussion hosted by Leerink Partners analyst Marc Goodman.
